summary: Dashboard redesign fully tested. All KPI cards (Revenue, Profit, Active, Inventory, Avg Sale), charts (Sales Performance area chart, Monthly Revenue bar chart, By Sport pie chart, Top Players horizontal bar chart), Recent Sales table, Best Sale highlight, Ending Soon section, and Date Range filters are working correctly. Dashboard is the default/first page when opening the app. Backend API /api/dashboard/analytics returns comprehensive data with sales timeline, monthly aggregation, inventory breakdown, and listings data.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions during initial render - non-blocking, charts display correctly after load

passed_tests: BACKEND - GET /api/dashboard/analytics returns 200 with complete data structure
BACKEND - Sales timeline with date, total, fee, profit, title, buyer fields
BACKEND - Monthly chart with YYYY-MM format months, revenue, profit values
BACKEND - Inventory breakdown by_sport and by_player with name, count, value
BACKEND - Listings with active_count, active_value, ending_soon items
BACKEND - Top sale identification working correctly
BACKEND - Timeline dates properly sorted chronologically
BACKEND - GET /api/ebay/seller/my-listings returns active listings with time_left
FRONTEND - Dashboard is default page when app loads
FRONTEND - KPI card: Revenue ($587.53, 16 sales)
FRONTEND - KPI card: Profit ($498.37, fees shown)
FRONTEND - KPI card: Active (73 listings, $782 value)
FRONTEND - KPI card: Inventory (3 items, $1.9k invested)
FRONTEND - KPI card: Avg Sale ($36.72, top sale shown)
FRONTEND - Sales Performance area chart with Revenue and Profit lines
FRONTEND - Monthly Revenue bar chart showing monthly data
FRONTEND - By Sport pie/donut chart showing Basketball (3 cards, $1.0k)
FRONTEND - Top Players horizontal bar chart
FRONTEND - Recent Sales table with 8 rows, prices, profit per sale
FRONTEND - Best Sale highlight card ($90.50 - LeBron James card)
FRONTEND - Ending Soon section with 5+ items and time remaining
FRONTEND - Date range filter buttons (30D, 90D, 180D, ALL) visible
FRONTEND - 30D filter changes revenue from $587.53 to $299.24 (9 sales)
FRONTEND - View All button in Recent Sales
FRONTEND - Quick Inventory and Listings buttons
FRONTEND - Refresh button reloads data
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard fetches from /api/dashboard/analytics (new endpoint) - properly aggregates eBay Fulfillment API orders
Recharts integration working with AreaChart, BarChart, PieChart components
Date filtering is client-side using useMemo for performance - filters sales timeline by date cutoff
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
API response structure is well-designed with nested sales/inventory/listings objects
seed_data_creation: None - using real eBay data (16 orders, 73 listings, 3 inventory items)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard redesign complete and tested. Uses Recharts library (recharts@3.8.0). Real eBay data - 16 orders since Dec 2025, 73 active listings, 3 inventory items (all Basketball). Date range filter works client-side by filtering sales timeline. Recharts throws console warnings about dimensions during initial render but charts display correctly. Best test URL: https://cardpro-image.preview.emergentagent.com - opens directly to Dashboard.
